degraded_reason: Single ready bead implemented directly by parent; independent Codex reviewer subagents used for review gate.
review_blocker_summary: Initial schema/model coverage review requested stricter terminal error/cancel fields, tool lifecycle status rules, status-dependent attributes, and canonical error representation.
Initial validation/copy review requested scalar attribute validation, defensive clone behavior, event category checks, UTC timestamp invariants, and tests for these cases.
Updated internal/model with explicit pointer error flags, schema-aware attribute typing, tool lifecycle validation, canonical ObservationError validation, UTC checks, and deeper clone support.
Focused re-reviews approved both blocker sets with no remaining blocking findings.
